file_insights.changes: Added SharedFlow<ScanResult> infrastructure with CoroutineScope, MutableSharedFlow setup, and emit logic in BroadcastReceiver
Updated permissions configuration, adjusted allowed commands and skills
Added build output showing KAPT compilation error related to jdk.compiler module access

patterns_discovered.description: scannerScope = CoroutineScope(SupervisorJob() + Dispatchers.Main.immediate) ensures failure isolation and UI thread safety
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents one failed emission from cancelling all subsequent emissions

patterns_discovered.description: Internal _scanEvents (MutableSharedFlow) exposed as public scanEvents (SharedFlow) read-only
patterns_discovered.benefit: Encapsulation and API safety - consumers cannot emit directly

patterns_discovered.description: replay=0, extraBufferCapacity=1 allows buffering one event when no active collectors
patterns_discovered.benefit: Handles edge cases without full replay overhead
Non-blocking event processing in system broadcast handler

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: KAPT compilation error with jdk.compiler module access
gotchas_discovered.context: build.log shows IllegalAccessError in KaptJavaCompiler during kaptGenerateStubsDebugKotlin
gotchas_discovered.resolution_status: unclear - marked SUCCESS but build failed

gotchas_discovered.context: gradle.version changed from 8.2 to 8.4, may have triggered module access issues
Code comment indicates debouncing will be added later - current implementation emits all scan events
Dispatchers.Main.immediate requires careful consideration - could bypass queue for immediate UI updates
gotchas_discovered.note: Appropriate here but could cause issues if SharedFlow collectors are not UI-ready

approach_outcome.implementation_completeness: Core SharedFlow infrastructure implemented and integrated
key_achievements: Clean public API with read-only SharedFlow exposure
Proper coroutine scope management with failure isolation
Comprehensive code documentation with usage example
approach_outcome.build_status: FAILED with KAPT error despite SUCCESS marking
approach_outcome.integration_readiness: Moderate - core flow works but build issues must be resolved

recommendations.recommendation: Resolve KAPT jdk.compiler module access error - may require Java/Gradle version compatibility adjustment or Hilt configuration
recommendations.rationale: Build is failing despite code success; blocks further development

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for SharedFlow emissions and verify buffering behavior with no collectors
recommendations.rationale: No test coverage visible; edge case with extraBufferCapacity needs validation

recommendations.recommendation: Provide ViewModel consumer examples in documentation - current code example is good but needs best practices guide
recommendations.rationale: viewModelScope integration is crucial for memory leak prevention

recommendations.recommendation: Implement debouncing in next subtask to prevent excessive emissions from rapid scanner triggers
recommendations.rationale: Code explicitly defers this; continuous event emission could overwhelm consumers

recommendations.recommendation: Add retry logic and exception handling for emission failures despite SupervisorJob isolation
recommendations.rationale: Current emit() has no explicit error handling; SupervisorJob prevents cascade but not individual failure recovery

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding cleanup/cancellation logic for scannerScope on manager lifecycle events
recommendations.rationale: Manual CoroutineScope lifecycle management needed - no automatic cleanup visible
